providerNotifications: New side effects from recent injection
New abnormal involuntary movements, excessive sedation, dizziness, agitation, delirium, fever, tachycardia, abnormal blood pressure, or any concerning symptoms

idealSteps: Dose not yet due. Please consult the fluphenazine early administration guidance.
Administer usual fluphenazine decanoate injection **if the dose is 50 mg or less**. (If the dose is greater than 50 mg, consult provider *before* administering.)
If symptoms of psychosis have returned or worsened, recommend oral fluphenazine supplementation (consult provider for order).
Schedule a check-in with patient in approximately **24 hours** (near peak dose) to assess for fluphenazine-related adverse effects.
providerNotifications: **Pre-injection:** Consult provider only if fluphenazine decanoate dose is greater than 50 mg.
**Post-injection:** Notify provider of the situation and request an order for oral supplementation if needed.

idealSteps: Do not administer. Reinitiation is required. **Consult provider BEFORE any injection.**
providerNotifications: **Before any injection:** Consult provider in all cases.

idealSteps: Dose not yet due. Please consult the fluphenazine early administration guidance.
Arrange for next injection at the previously planned dosing interval.
Administer usual fluphenazine decanoate injection **if the dose is 50 mg or less**.
> If the dose is greater than 50 mg, consult provider *before* administering.
If symptoms of psychosis have returned or worsened, recommend oral fluphenazine supplementation (consult provider for order).
Schedule a check-in with patient in approximately **24 hours** (near peak dose) to assess for fluphenazine-related adverse effects.
providerNotifications: **Pre-injection:** Consult provider only if fluphenazine decanoate dose is greater than 50 mg.
**Post-injection:** Notify provider of the situation and request an order for oral supplementation if needed (returned or worsened psychosis symptoms).

idealSteps: Do not administer. Reinitiation is required. **Consult provider BEFORE any injection.**
providerNotifications: **Before any injection:** Consult provider in all cases.
